task.tfcmaid.tfc_shears.desc: The maid will help you shear sheep and other animals.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_shears.condition.has_sh: Holding shears in the main hand.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_feather.desc: The maid will help you feather birds.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_milk.desc: The maid will help you milk animals.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_milk.condition.has_cont: Has available container in main hand or backpack.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_feed.desc: The maid will help you feed animals.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_feed.condition.has_food: Has food for animals in main hand or backpack.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_kill_old.desc: The maid will kill aged animals.
